about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Learn more about Zehin Yoly Education Center
about.who_p1: Zehin Yoly is a premier education center based in Turkmenistan, dedicated to providing high-quality education in languages and sciences. Our mission is to empower students with the knowledge and skills they need to succeed in an increasingly interconnected world.
about.who_p2: We offer courses in English, Russian, German, Chinese, Korean, Mathematics, Chemistry, Biology, and Mental Arithmetic. Our experienced instructors use modern teaching methods to ensure every student reaches their full potential.
about.follow_sub: Stay connected with us on social media for the latest updates, news, and educational content.
footer.desc: Education center in Turkmenistan — empowering minds through languages and sciences.
